Findings.Title: AWS access key leaked in commit history
Findings.Detail: gitleaks rule aws-access-token matched in src/legacy/uploader.py at commit 9a3f.
Findings.Remediation: Rotate the leaked credential and rewrite history with git-filter-repo.

Findings.Title: Generic API key in .env.example
Findings.Detail: gitleaks rule generic-api-key flagged 32-char string at .env.example:14.

Findings.Title: No secrets in last 30 days of commits
